descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes advance to Western final after scoring against the Rustlers, outshootting them 39-34.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Rustlers in what appears to be a playoff game on April 18, 1987. Goals were scored by Jason Phillips, Jim Gunn, Mike McCormick, and Tony Bobbitt. Richmond outshot their opponents 39-34 and advanced to face the Humboldt Broncos in the Western best-of-seven final.
